== Notes for [[Item:Q105649|Q105649]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): 61 AH (682 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yahya_bin_Ali

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Ali

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:5247602476970065886

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
